title: Koeleria littoralis
intro: Koeleria littoralis, also known as small hair grass or beach hair grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Koeleria littoralis has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a promising natural remedy for various ailments. The bioactive constituents of Koeleria littoralis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Koeleria littoralis is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
